Last updated: 2026-04-11

# Elzinga Creative Studio

> Professional photography, videography, and marketing agency based in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Serving West Michigan including Kent County, Ottawa County, and surrounding areas.

## About the Photographer

Kaden Elzinga is a Grand Rapids, Michigan-based photographer and videographer specializing in real estate, portrait, and commercial work. He founded Elzinga Creative Studio as a full-service visual media LLC serving clients throughout West Michigan. Notable clients include the Grand Rapids Griffins (AHL hockey team), Biggby Coffee, and Mars Hill Church.

## Key Facts

- 24-hour turnaround on all real estate photography packages
- Service area: 19+ cities across Kent, Ottawa, and Allegan Counties
- Real estate packages start at $175 (Standard) through $525 (Signature)
- Available for travel beyond West Michigan for weddings and commercial projects
- Phone: (616) 258-4578

## About

Elzinga Creative Studio is a full-service visual media agency owned and operated by Kaden Elzinga. We specialize in real estate photography, portrait work, commercial content creation, and digital marketing services. Our work has been used by real estate agents, local businesses, brands, sports organizations, and individuals throughout the greater Grand Rapids area.

## Services

### Real Estate Photography
Interior and exterior HDR photography for residential and commercial listings. Packages include standard daytime shoots, real twilight/blue hour shoots, 2D floor plans (CubiCasa), social media graphics, vertical cuts for Instagram/TikTok, and 60-second listing Reels. Designed to help realtors sell listings faster with professional, high-impact visuals. 24-hour turnaround on all packages.

**Packages:**
- Standard — $175: HDR interiors + exteriors, 25–35 images, MLS-ready, 24-hour delivery
- Showcase — $325: Everything in Standard + real twilight shoot + 2D floor plan + 3 social graphics + vertical cuts, 40–55 images
- Signature — $525: Everything in Showcase + golden hour exteriors + 60-second listing Reel, 55–70 images

### Senior Portraits
High-quality senior portrait sessions for high school seniors throughout West Michigan. Natural, editorial, and lifestyle options available.

### Wedding Photography
Full-day wedding coverage and engagement sessions. Candid and portrait-style photography for couples in Grand Rapids and across Michigan.

### Sports Photography
Action and team photography for youth, high school, and professional sports organizations. Past clients include the Grand Rapids Griffins (AHL).

### Family Photography
Lifestyle and traditional family portrait sessions for all family sizes and compositions.

### Commercial & Brand Photography
Product photography, brand content, and marketing visuals for local businesses. Past clients include Biggby Coffee (Pop Kitchen LLC) and Mars Hill.

### Videography
Brand videos, event coverage, listing Reels, and promotional content for businesses and organizations throughout West Michigan.

### Digital Marketing
Meta and Google Ads campaign creation and management. Full-service marketing support for small businesses looking to grow their digital presence.

## Service Area

Grand Rapids, Michigan | Wyoming, Michigan | Kentwood, Michigan | Walker, Michigan | Grandville, Michigan | Holland, Michigan | Ada, Michigan | East Grand Rapids, Michigan | Forest Hills, Michigan | Rockford, Michigan | Caledonia, Michigan | Byron Center, Michigan | Hudsonville, Michigan | Muskegon, Michigan | Kalamazoo, Michigan | West Michigan | Kent County | Ottawa County | Allegan County
